metadata.rider: JetBrains Rider 2026.1.x on Windows, macOS, and Linux
metadata.vsCode: Visual Studio Code with C# Dev Kit pinned minor in Dev Container/manual evidence
metadata.calibrationIde: Visual Studio is the calibration IDE; the matrix is the authoritative parity contract.
metadata.fixtureContentHashScope: Concatenated SHA-256 of samples/IdeParityCounter/*.cs in declaration order; recorded as fixtureContentHash on every evidence manifest.

rows.capability: Generated type completion is visible for deterministic projection and command symbols.
rows.validationMethod: CI verifies generated symbols and manual IDE evidence captures completions.
rows.expectedResult: CounterProjection, ConfigureCounterCommand, and generated renderer symbols appear without editing generated files.
rows.knownLimitation: Vendor completion popups remain manual release evidence when no legal headless automation exists.
rows.releaseGate: CI for repo-owned output; release checklist for vendor UI.
rows.revalidationTrigger: IDE, extension, .NET SDK, generated path contract, or fixture hash changes.

vsCodeDevKit.version: VS Code stable + C# Dev Kit pinned minor
vsCodeDevKit.status: manual release evidence; Microsoft account/licensing prerequisites apply

rows.capability: XML documentation hover content exists for public attributes and generated-facing symbols.
rows.validationMethod: CI verifies XML doc source and manual IDE quick-info evidence.
rows.expectedResult: [Projection], [Command], [BoundedContext], and generated-facing symbols describe what they generate and link to docs.
rows.knownLimitation: Vendor hover formatting can differ while the source XML doc contract remains stable.
rows.releaseGate: CI blocks missing repo-owned XML docs.
rows.revalidationTrigger: Public attribute XML docs or generated-facing contracts change.

vsCodeDevKit.version: VS Code stable + C# Dev Kit pinned minor

rows.capability: Go To Definition resolves generated source through the public output path contract.
rows.validationMethod: CI validates path contract for Debug/Release and multi-targeted fixtures; manual IDE evidence records navigation target.
rows.knownLimitation: An IDE may show virtual generated source if it still maps to the same generated symbol family.
rows.revalidationTrigger: Generated output path template, compiler generated files settings, or TFM support changes.

vsCodeDevKit.version: VS Code stable + C# Dev Kit pinned minor

rows.capability: HFC diagnostics surface with deterministic IDs, severities, and help links.
rows.validationMethod: CI verifies DiagnosticDescriptor metadata and manual IDE evidence captures squiggle IDs.
rows.expectedResult: HFC diagnostics include stable IDs, expected severity, and HelpLinkUri for surfaced diagnostics.
rows.knownLimitation: Final per-ID docs pages are completed by Story 9-4 and Story 9-5.
rows.releaseGate: CI blocks missing repo-owned diagnostic IDs or help links for fixture diagnostics.
rows.revalidationTrigger: Diagnostic descriptors or analyzer release files change.

vsCodeDevKit.version: VS Code stable + C# Dev Kit pinned minor

rows.capability: Solution-wide symbol search includes generated type and member names.
rows.validationMethod: CI verifies deterministic symbol names; manual IDE evidence records search terms.
rows.expectedResult: CounterProjectionRegistration, CounterProjectionFeature, and command renderer symbols are discoverable.
rows.knownLimitation: Vendor indexes may lag until rebuild; release evidence records rebuild/regenerate steps.
rows.releaseGate: Release checklist blocks until evidence is fresh.
rows.revalidationTrigger: IDE indexer, generated hint names, or fixture symbol names change.

vsCodeDevKit.version: VS Code stable + C# Dev Kit pinned minor

rows.capability: Incremental generator behavior remains within the NFR8 500 ms warm-update budget.
rows.validationMethod: CI uses existing benchmark boundary and records cold/warm expectations separately.
rows.expectedResult: Warm incremental update remains under 500 ms for the fixture boundary.
rows.knownLimitation: IDE UI latency is vendor evidence; repo-owned generator timing is CI evidence.
rows.revalidationTrigger: Generator pipeline, Roslyn package pin, or benchmark fixture changes.

vsCodeDevKit.version: VS Code stable + C# Dev Kit pinned minor

rows.capability: Find All References from a domain symbol to generated usage is documented per IDE.
rows.validationMethod: Manual release evidence records domain symbol and generated usage result.
rows.expectedResult: Evidence identifies whether generated usage appears directly or through frontcomposer inspect fallback.
rows.knownLimitation: Vendor reference indexing differs; fallback is generated file inspection.
rows.releaseGate: Release checklist warning unless a FrontComposer output defect is proven.
rows.revalidationTrigger: IDE reference indexer or generated symbol naming changes.

vsCodeDevKit.version: VS Code stable + C# Dev Kit pinned minor

rows.capability: Rename workflow follows domain edit, rebuild/regenerate, inspect generated output, verify diagnostics.
rows.validationMethod: Manual release evidence records the domain symbol rename workflow.
rows.expectedResult: Generated files update after rebuild; direct generated-file rename is unsupported.
rows.knownLimitation: Generated files remain read-only by design.
rows.releaseGate: Release checklist warning unless generated output fails to update.
rows.revalidationTrigger: Generator output naming or CLI inspect command changes.

vsCodeDevKit.version: VS Code stable + C# Dev Kit pinned minor

rows.capability: Analyzer code-fix application is documented where an HFC diagnostic has a code fix.
rows.validationMethod: Manual evidence records available code fixes; rows stay limitation-backed until code fixes ship.
rows.expectedResult: IDE-specific limitation is recorded instead of implying a code fix exists.
rows.knownLimitation: Current story does not add custom IDE extensions or new code fixes.
rows.revalidationTrigger: New HFC code fix provider ships.

vsCodeDevKit.version: VS Code stable + C# Dev Kit pinned minor

rows.validationMethod: CONTRIBUTING.md documents Debugger.Launch, JIT attach, compiler server cache behavior, clean/rebuild, and Roslyn pin sensitivity.
rows.expectedResult: Adopter docs stay focused on generated application debugging while contributors get generator-host guidance.
rows.knownLimitation: Vendor generator-host attach behavior differs and is not an adopter parity promise.
rows.releaseGate: Release checklist verifies docs stay split.
rows.revalidationTrigger: Roslyn package pin, compiler server behavior, or contributor debugging workflow changes.

vsCodeDevKit.version: VS Code stable + C# Dev Kit pinned minor

rows.capability: VS Code remote/container path records C# Dev Kit prerequisites and limitations.
rows.validationMethod: Dev Container configuration documents prerequisites; release evidence records legal authenticated validation or blocking manual evidence.
rows.expectedResult: C# Dev Kit is required; OmniSharp-only VS Code is unsupported in v1.
rows.knownLimitation: CI must not install IDE extensions, accept licenses, or leak Microsoft account identifiers.
rows.releaseGate: Release checklist blocks until remote/container evidence is fresh.
rows.revalidationTrigger: C# Dev Kit licensing, Dev Container base image, VS Code extension pin, Remote-SSH, Codespaces, or container auth changes.

visualStudio.status: not applicable to remote VS Code row

rider.status: not applicable to remote VS Code row

vsCodeDevKit.version: VS Code stable + C# Dev Kit pinned minor

rows.capability: Unsupported IDE, extension, or .NET SDK version drift produces a blocking revalidation issue or dry-run artifact.
rows.validationMethod: CI compares configured pins and writes a deterministic blocking dry-run issue artifact when GitHub is unavailable.
rows.expectedResult: Issue body includes matrix rows, current pin, detected version, fixture, expected/observed behavior, evidence needed, and owner.
rows.knownLimitation: No IDE or extension install/update is attempted by the job.
rows.releaseGate: CI/release blocks on unsupported configured version drift.
rows.revalidationTrigger: Configured IDE, extension, or .NET SDK version exits pinned range.

vsCodeDevKit.version: VS Code stable + C# Dev Kit pinned minor

rows.capability: Custom Visual Studio, Rider, or VS Code extensions.
rows.expectedResult: No custom IDE extension is added by Story 9-3.
rows.knownLimitation: If built-in vendor tooling cannot meet a Must row, extension work needs a separate product and architecture decision.
rows.releaseGate: Not a release gate for Story 9-3.
rows.revalidationTrigger: Party-mode review explicitly re-scopes IDE extension work.

vsCodeDevKit.version: VS Code stable + C# Dev Kit pinned minor
